subcodes.first_line: O God, Bestower of gifts, Unveiler of all that is veiled, Possessor of the mercy that precedeth all things—I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا واهب العطاء و یا کاشف الغطاء و یا ذا الرحمه التی سبقت الاشیاء اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
